citations.narrative:
The facility failed to maintain housing in good repair. In the Ponderosa East building, two female pigs (ID 9798 and 9727)
are housed inside their enclosure labeled #10. The individual pens have wooden boards mounted on each side of the
door that contain exposed flat-head screws protruding ¼ inch to ¾ inch into the pen creating sharp edges. All screwheads
are accessible to pigs, especially when they jump up on the door. Protruding sharp edges can cause injury to the animals.
Housing facilities shall be maintained in good repair to protect the animals from injury and to contain the animals. To be
corrected by April 10, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with attending veterinarian and IACUC representative.
n

narrative:
3.125(a)  Repeat
   
Facilities, general. 
The facility failed to maintain housing in good repair. In the Ponderosa East building, two female pigs (ID 9798 and 9727) 
are housed inside their enclosure labeled #10. The individual pens have wooden boards mounted on each side of the 
door that contain exposed flat-head screws protruding ¼ inch to ¾ inch into the pen creating sharp edges. All screwheads 
are accessible to pigs, especially when they jump up on the door. Protruding sharp edges can cause injury to the animals. 
Housing facilities shall be maintained in good repair to protect the animals from injury and to contain the animals. To be 
corrected by April 10, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with attending veterinarian and IACUC representative.
